195 578 (LAL):
210 578 Means
226 578 there
238 578 is
243 578 an
250 578 Ilco
259 578 Look-Alike
284 578 remote
300 578 equivalent
324 578 for
331 578 all
337 578 or
343 578 part
353 578 of
359 578 the
367 578 model
382 578 coverage
403 578 years.

435 578 www.ilcolookalike.com

522 578 complete
543 578 Look-Alike
